steps.expected: Examples page loads with grid of cards
steps.observed: 14 example cards displayed in grid layout

14 examples visible: HelloWorld.asm, Template.asm, Addition.asm, Buff2.asm, Buffered.asm, demo.asm, proc.asm, forloop.asm, ifelse.asm, Exchange.asm, Compare.asm, RegisterSwap.asm, ArithmeticDemo.asm, whileloop.asm

steps.expected: Grid view and List view buttons visible
steps.observed: Both buttons present in header
Layout changed - card text format changed from 'HelloWorld.asm MOV, LEA, INT L4 beginner 23 lines' to 'HelloWorld.asm MOV, LEA, INT L4 beginner' (no line count, more instruction details)

assertions.title: Filter by lecture

steps.expected: Combobox with lecture options (All Lectures, L4, L5, etc.)
steps.observed: Combobox visible with 'All Lectures' selected
Element times out when attempting to click or select

assertions.issues: Combobox element (e13) is visible in accessibility tree but not interactable - all click/select operations time out. This is a custom UI component that may not be properly exposed to Playwright.

steps.expected: Examples filtered to show only MOV-related ones
steps.observed: Results filtered from 14 to 12 examples

steps.expected: Compare.asm and ifelse.asm should be hidden
steps.observed: Compare.asm and ifelse.asm not in filtered results
All 14 examples restored
8 beginner examples displayed (down from 14)

steps.expected: proc.asm (advanced) and Buff2.asm (intermediate) should be hidden
steps.observed: Only beginner-labeled cards shown

assertions.title: Example cards show name, lecture, and difficulty

steps.expected: Card displays: name, lecture number, difficulty
steps.observed: Card shows 'HelloWorld.asm MOV, LEA, INT L4 beginner 23 lines' - name (HelloWorld.asm), lecture (L4), difficulty (beginner)
URL changed to http://localhost:4173/examples/ex-001
Page shows HelloWorld.asm with code, related examples, and practice questions

assertions.title: Active filters clear on navigation

steps.expected: URL updates to include filter parameter (?search=MOV)
steps.observed: URL remained /examples without parameters
Filters cleared on navigation - page loaded with no filters applied

assertions.issues: URL parameters are NOT updated when filters are applied. Filters do clear on navigation which is correct behavior, but the lack of URL parameter sync means filters cannot be bookmarked or shared.

steps.observed: Count decreased from 14 to 12 examples

assertions.title: Empty state when no examples match filter

steps.expected: Empty state message with clear filters option
steps.observed: No example cards displayed, 'Clear filters' button visible

steps.expected: Code viewer shows assembly with line numbers
steps.observed: Code shows line numbers 1-23 for HelloWorld.asm

steps.expected: Instructions, registers, comments have distinct colors
steps.observed: Text shows color classes: text-amber-400 (addresses), text-purple (registers), text-blue (values), font-semibold (instructions)

steps.expected: Navigate to simulator with code loaded
steps.observed: URL changed to /simulator?code=<base64-encoded-code>
6 related example links displayed: Buffered.asm, Buff2.asm, Template.asm, Addition.asm, demo.asm, Exchange.asm
URL changed to /examples/ex-005

steps.expected: Button visible in code viewer header
steps.observed: Button present next to 'Run in Simulator'
Button click executed without error
Code displayed with 33 lines visible
Page scrolls to show rest of code content

frictions.description: Hash-based routing (/#/examples) not properly recognized by agent-browser - page redirected to landing page. Used non-hash URL (/examples) instead.
frictions.resolution: Used /examples URL directly which uses client-side hash routing internally

frictions.description: Page occasionally navigated away to /course-map unexpectedly during testing
frictions.resolution: Re-navigated to /examples after each unexpected navigation

blockers.description: Lecture filter combobox element is not interactable - all click/select operations timeout. Custom UI component may not be properly exposed to Playwright automation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried: click combobox, select option, find by role, focus, scrollintoview - all timed out

summary: Tested 16 assertions for Example Explorer (P2-EXP-001 to P2-EXP-010) and Code Viewer (P2-CODE-001 to P2-CODE-006). Results: 13 passed, 1 blocked (lecture filter combobox), 1 failed (URL parameter sync for filters), 1 skipped/not fully tested due to time constraints. The lecture filter combobox is visible but not interactable via automation. The filter functionality otherwise works correctly (search and difficulty filters). Code viewer displays properly with line numbers, syntax highlighting, copy button, run in simulator, and related examples.
